title: Codex Routing Scheduler Observability Refactor
problem: Routing, local concurrency gates, upstream throttle cooldowns, retry/failover decisions, and session/TUI metrics are correct in pieces but not yet represented through one first-class scheduler and observability boundary.

continue_policy.notes: Continue while the work is limited to scheduler runtime state, attempt outcome classification, and operator/session observability. Split route graph semantics changes into a separate workstream.
